entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being studied for root characteristics.

entities.name: ROOT CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: General characteristics of the root system in sorghum.

entities.name: APPLIED BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: The application for which the data on root characteristics are examined.

entities.name: ROOT-LENGTH DENSITY
entities.description: A specific root characteristic measured at lower depths.

entities.name: STORED SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The soil moisture condition under which root-length density was observed.

entities.name: ROOT-SHOOT RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of root biomass to shoot biomass.

entities.name: NODAL ROOTS
entities.description: Roots that emerge from the nodes of the plant.

entities.name: SEEDLING STAGE
entities.description: The early growth stage of the plant.

entities.name: MICROBIAL ASSOCIATIONS OF ROOTS
entities.description: The symbiotic or associative relationships between roots and microorganisms.

entities.name: ONTOGENIC SHIFTS
entities.description: Developmental changes occurring as the plant matures.

entities.name: EFFICIENT ROOT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Root systems optimized for nutrient and water uptake.

entities.name: TARGET ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Specific environmental conditions defined for breeding objectives.
